summary: Verified the new OrderDropdown replaces the previous single DoorDash button on the reveal card. Backend /api/places/search returns all four URL fields for every restaurant (doordash_url, ubereats_url, grubhub_url, order_url) for both food and drinks categories. Frontend end-to-end: completed the food deal flow (skip intro -> Food mode -> ZIP 10001 -> Deal -> reveal). On reveal card, order-dropdown-trigger renders labeled 'Order / Delivery'; opening it shows order-dropdown-content with all 4 items (doordash, ubereats, grubhub, order) with correct labels. Old testids doordash-button and order-online-button are absent. rate-on-google-button ('Reviews & ratings') still coexists. Each dropdown item calls window.open with the correct host (doordash.com, ubereats.com, grubhub.com, google.com respectively) — verified by hooking window.open and clicking each option.
critical_code_review_comments: OrderDropdown.jsx renders nothing if all four URL fields are absent (options.length === 0 -> null). For shops/fuel modes RevealStage intentionally hides it, so the empty-state fallback is only defensive — good.
The dropdown items use onSelect + e.preventDefault() to keep the menu closable but call window.open with 'noopener,noreferrer' — correct security posture.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth used in this flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: OrderDropdown lives in /app/frontend/src/components/OrderDropdown.jsx and is used both in RevealStage (reveal card, for non-shops/non-fuel modes) and RestaurantCard tiles (triggerTestId='order-dropdown-<id>'). Backend populates doordash_url/ubereats_url/grubhub_url/order_url in both routes/places.py (google + curated branches) and routes/restaurants.py. Old testids doordash-button and order-online-button no longer exist. Guided ritual modal still appears on first visit — click 'Skip intro' or complete steps to reach the deal button.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature request working as designed.
